name: ai-receptionist-pro
description: AI-powered business phone management platform with WebSocket, Authentication, and Comprehensive Logging

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --reload"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cp -r .next ../.next && cp -r public ../public
scripts.start: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run start" "cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt

author: AI Receptionist Team
